title: Darksiders III

notes: Game runs smoothly on epic setting but the sound stutters constantly. Both in cutscenes, in-game and menues.
title: Darksiders III

notes: Games runs perfectly in terms of visuals and frame rates, but the audio stutters and lags behind quite a lot
title: Darksiders III

notes:
The audio was stuttering. The fix for audio was mentioned before for games using UE4 engine. This is the issue in github for reference.

https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/54

After applying what was suggested the audio had no issues. I played for 30min just to troubleshoot initial issues.
I report this because maybe someone has the same audio issue and can use this fix.
title: Darksiders III

notes: Audio is easily fixed by overriding xaudio_2_7 using winecfg. Unfortunately, it is not possible to finish the game, because Gluttiny will never enter it's second phase during the boss fight. Other than that the game runs fairly well except a few crashes after you acquire the Storm Hollow.
title: Darksiders III

notes: Installed xact with winetricks and disabled esync. Played on the publicstaging branch in Steam. Now the game runs without issues for me, no stuttering or crashes, but I only played for about an hour.
title: Darksiders III

notes: Installed xact with winetricks and disabled esync. Now the game runs without issues for me, no stuttering or crashes, but I only played for about an hour.
title: Darksiders III

notes:
Full playthrough. I had some audio issues, but installing xact (via winetricks) and increasing Pulse's buffer size solved that. At certain areas the game froze with RADV, so I tried AMDVLK (18.40) instead. The game ran fine, but didn't really cache shaders, which caused it to stutter every time I started it. Forcing the driver to cache shaders on disk ("ShaderCacheMode,3" ind amdPalSettings.cfg) solved that, too. After these tweaks, the game ran without any flaws. As starting options (in Steam) I used: VK_ICD_FILENAMES="/usr/share/vulkan/icd.d/amd_icd64.json" PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=120 %command%

I captured a gameplay snippet of a few minutes: https://youtu.be/o3cvU1PdfsQ
title: Darksiders III

notes: No issues, works smooth and stable. (With 3.16-5, the sound bugs got fixed too)
title: Darksiders III

notes: Can't get completely stable 60 fps even on medium settings. On high it drops down to 30 from time to time. Everything else is fine.
title: Darksiders III

notes:
At first the audio was stutering.
I installed xact with winetricks and the it works perfectly, stable 60 fps on medium settings.
I was able to complete the game without any issues :)
title: Darksiders III
